column1: # 25 cells in plane 1 第3水準 whose canonical mapping is a Unicode
# *combining sequence* (a base character followed by a combining
# diacritic) rather than a single scalar. They cannot be represented
# as a single `char` and therefore live in a separate string-valued
# phf::Map. The lookup API stitches both maps together so callers
